page.title: Notification preferences
page.subtitle: Choose which events send an email. PHI-incident alerts are always on by compliance policy.
page.saveError: Failed to save preferences. Your change was reverted.

clinical.title: Clinical events
clinical.description: Case pipeline outcomes relevant to your reviews.

operational.title: Operational events
operational.description: Queue health, PACS delivery, system maintenance.

security.title: Security & compliance
security.description: Account activity, invites, erasure confirmations, PHI incidents.

analysis_complete.label: Analysis complete
analysis_complete.description: Sent when one of your uploaded cases finishes all pipeline stages.

analysis_failed.label: Analysis failed
analysis_failed.description: Sent when a pipeline stage fails with a non-retryable error.

queued_long.label: Case queued over 15 min
queued_long.description: Sent when a queued case has waited longer than the ops SLO.

pacs_failed.label: PACS push failed
pacs_failed.description: Sent when a report delivery exhausts its retry budget.

maintenance_window.label: Maintenance window
maintenance_window.description: Sent 24h before a scheduled infrastructure change that may affect availability.

mfa_reset.label: MFA reset
mfa_reset.description: Sent when someone (you or an admin) resets your multi-factor credentials.

invite_accepted.label: Invite accepted
invite_accepted.description: Sent to the inviter when a new user completes onboarding.

erasure_confirmed.label: Erasure confirmed
erasure_confirmed.description: Sent to the requester when a GDPR Art. 17 erasure completes with tombstone.

phi_incident.label: PHI incident
phi_incident.description: Mandatory alert — cannot be disabled — sent if a PHI-touching error is detected.

phiLocked.tooltip: PHI-incident alerts are mandated by compliance policy and cannot be disabled.
